# Yolanda Santa Cruz — Product Design Portfolio

> Professional portfolio of Yolanda Santa Cruz, a Product Designer specializing in user-centric interfaces, design systems, and responsive prototypes.

## About This Site

This is a personal portfolio website showcasing product design case studies and professional experience.

## Pages

- Home: https://yolandasantacruz.com/
- About: https://yolandasantacruz.com/about
- Resume: https://yolandasantacruz.com/resume

## Case Studies

- Pay with App: https://yolandasantacruz.com/projects/pay-with-app
  Redesigned the transaction flow leading to a 50% drop in dispute rates and a 92% reduction in dispute-related costs.

- Fetch Pay: https://yolandasantacruz.com/projects/fetch-pay
  Increasing user sign-ups by 20%, reducing activation costs by 96%, and boosting card activations by 35%.

- Isles at Bayshore: https://yolandasantacruz.com/projects/isles-at-bayshore
  Digital transformation for a premier real estate development.

- PlantMe: https://yolandasantacruz.com/projects/plant-me
  A plant care companion app designed to help users nurture and track their plants.

- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/yolandasantacruz
